description: Global transit via Transitland v2 — operators, GTFS/GTFS-RT/GBFS feeds, routes, stops, departures.
name: io.github.cyanheads/transitland-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Transitland v2 API key, sent as the `apikey` query parameter. Get one at the Transitland developer portal.
environmentVariables.name: TRANSITLAND_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the Transitland REST API base URL (default https://transit.land/api/v2/rest).
environmentVariables.name: TRANSITLAND_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
